question_text: Which three of the following are benefits of project planning?

answers.answer_text: It gives you time to identify and prepare for risks that could impact your project.
It helps individuals assigned to your project become a strong team by working together.
It helps you map out the full project.
It helps you brainstorm preliminary goals for the project.

question_text: What are three major project components that are worked out during the planning phase?

answers.answer_text: Schedule, budget, and risk management plan
Project tracking, quality management, and retrospectives

question_text: During the kickoff meeting, which agenda item involves discussing how the project came to be and why the project matters?
Which of the following are best practices when you are leading a kickoff meeting? Select all that apply.
How do your WBS diagram and spreadsheet help you to develop and launch the Operations and Training program for Plant Pals?

answers.answer_text: Clarify the tasks the team needs to accomplish to achieve project milestones
Help you recruit team members with the right skills for the project
Lay out the project’s costs in detail, so you don’t exceed your budget
Let customers know what to expect from the new service

question_text: Which team member did you assign to own the task, “supervise vendor installation of fulfillment equipment”?
Which team member did you assign to own the task, “train employees to use the software and equipment”?
Which of the following additional tasks are appropriate for the “establish a plant delivery and logistics plan” milestone? Select all that apply.

answers.answer_text: Hire warehouse employees to pack shipments
Source a vendor for additional types of plants

question_text: In the project planning phase, what type of meeting is the first meeting among the project team, stakeholders, and the project sponsor?
As a project manager in the planning phase, you have created a project schedule and accounted for the total costs. What is the third major planning component you will create?
Fill in the blank: After the stakeholders assign the project manager, the goals of the project have to be approved, as well as the scope of the project and its _____.
You review the tasks for the project and set dates to begin the project, site launch, and gather user feedback. Which of the following components of the planning phase does this update?
As a project manager, you facilitate a kick-off meeting. During the meeting, you introduce what work each person on the team is responsible for. Where on the agenda should this be?
Suppose as a project manager, you’re running a kick-off meeting. You accurately define what work is and is not included in the project. What agenda item does this represent?
Which of the following would you consider a project milestone?
What are the benefits of setting milestones? Select all that apply.

answers.answer_text: Breaking down information into milestones gives you a better idea of the amount of work that needs to be done.
Setting milestones helps you keep your project on track with clear deadlines for when to complete deliverables.
Setting milestones helps you to figure out if you need to adjust your scope, timelines, or resources to meet your goals.
Setting milestones encourages you to take time away from the project for new ideas.

question_text: What steps should you take to set proper deadlines for your milestones?

answers.answer_text: Assign milestones to be completed in week-long increments.
Connect with teammates to discuss the tasks required for the milestone.
Schedule deadlines for the milestones to account for the budget.
Assign as many tasks as you can for each milestone to impress stakeholders.

question_text: What is the outcome of creating a successful work breakdown structure (WBS)?

answers.answer_text: A resource for team members to choose which tasks they will work on
A set of project tasks that ladder up to each of your milestones
A set of project milestones that ladder up to each of your tasks
A resource for stakeholders to choose their favorite milestone
